feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: A sophomore at IIIS Tsinghua, interested in NLP and ML

entry.title: Fantastic Pretraining Optimizers and Where to Find Them 2.2: The Hitchhiker’s Guide to the Weight Norm Theory

link.title: Fantastic Pretraining Optimizers and Where to Find Them 2.2: The Hitchhiker’s Guide to the Weight Norm Theory

entry.content: This article is available locally at Fantastic Pretraining Optimizers and Where to Find Them 2.2: The Hitchhiker’s Guide to the Weight Norm Theory. You will be redirected automatically.
entry.summary: Why weight decay sets the effective step size, what weight norms are really doing, and how that theory motivates Hyperball.

entry.title: Fantastic Pretraining Optimizers and Where to Find Them 2.1: Hyperball Optimization

link.title: Fantastic Pretraining Optimizers and Where to Find Them 2.1: Hyperball Optimization

entry.content: This article is available locally at Fantastic Pretraining Optimizers and Where to Find Them 2.1: Hyperball Optimization. You will be redirected automatically.
entry.summary: Hyperball optimization, norm-constrained updates, and why explicit weight-norm control can speed up pretraining.
